creator: josh_bailey@lcca.com
text:
Just saw that FreeBSD 14.2-RELEASE was available and built a test VM.  I've run out of CPU credits, and it has clamped the processor down.  Azure is showing a consistent 26% CPU Usage.  Here is what top is showing.  I've also attached an updated screenshot of the CPU Usage for the 14.2-RELEASE.
